visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still does not visually match the same-name reference: dimension scheme, title/notes placement, and drawing density are substantially different.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The same general views are present, but the generated sheet is not reference-like: the main views are shifted/differently scaled and the large diagonal dimension crosses the layout.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Real DisplayDims exist and lifecycle audit passes, but the visible dimension set is over-dimensioned compared with the reference and includes non-reference dimension stacks.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text, arrows, leaders, and extension lines cluster around the right/center views; several labels are too dense or visually ambiguous for manufacturing use.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The lower title/data area does not match the compact reference title block placement and remains visually inconsistent with the reference drawing.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical notes are present but placed/styled differently from the reference and are not yet sufficient as a reference-matching manufacturing note block.

findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the reference image.
This run improved the technical lifecycle: DisplayDim lifecycle now passes and generated artifacts are current-run SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG.
Visual acceptance still fails because the generated drawing remains over-dimensioned and visibly different from the reference drawing.
The long diagonal dimension line and dense right-side dimension stack make the drawing unsuitable for manufacturing review in its current form.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review remains the final gate and is FAIL.
entries.required_correction: Keep the DisplayDim lifecycle improvements, then learn the reference dimension scheme more strictly: remove non-reference dimension stacks, prevent diagonal cross-sheet dimension placement, place hole/pitch dimensions in the same lane style as the reference, and rebuild the compact title/notes area before another locked 006-only CAD rerun.
